topic.title: Product Overview
topic.shortdesc: An introduction to the product and its key features.

body.p: The product provides a comprehensive solution for managing and deploying content at scale.

ul.li: Automated deployment — push content to multiple environments with a single command.
Version control — track changes to your content with built-in versioning.
Role-based access — control who can publish and manage content.
Real-time collaboration — multiple authors can work on content simultaneously.

section.title: Getting Started
section.p: To get started, first review the system requirements, then follow the installation guide.
For a complete list of available commands, see the CLI reference.
